steps.t: Klátha is located in a camp north of Bazanmanar. Nósni has asked you to bring the furs to Klátha.
The pile of furs is next to Klátha, in northern Clovengap. You should add your furs to the pile.
Klátha is located in Bazanmanar. You should let Klátha know you have added your furs to the pile.
Nósni is located in a camp north of Bazanmanar. Klátha has asked you to give her message of refusal to Nósni.
